user_query:
I’m putting together two pieces of communication for this month and could really use your help drafting them from the materials in this workspace.

Please produce both of the following deliverables under the out/ directory:
1) out/email_draft.md — a supporter email draft that:
   - Begins with a single line starting with: "Subject: ", and includes the month label from input/context.json (field: month_label).
   - Greets "friends and supporters" and uses a warm, grounded tone that reflects the voice and boundaries in input/notes.md.
   - Includes a short paragraph that authentically references how painting gave me purpose (use language aligned with notes; make sure the words "painting" and "purpose" appear).
   - Contains an "At-a-glance" bullet list (at least 3 bullets) summarizing:
     • Studio progress: include the total count of new works based on the number of files under assets/images/new_works and mention their titles sourced from input/artworks.json.
     • Next exhibition: include the exhibition title and date pulled from input/events.csv.
     • Community workshop: include the workshop title and date pulled from input/events.csv.
   - Politely invites readers to RSVP or reply if they plan to attend, without adding links.

2) out/status_update.md — a concise, 1-page-equivalent status update for my reentry arts program coordinator that:
   - Contains two clearly labeled sections: "Highlights" and "Upcoming commitments".
   - In "Highlights", includes a bullet exactly in the form "New works: N" where N is the count of files under assets/images/new_works, and mentions the next exhibition by title.
   - In "Upcoming commitments", lists the upcoming workshop by title.
   - Includes a 2–3 sentence reflective note consistent with input/notes.md.

Important constraints and how to source information:
- Do not fabricate events or artworks. Use only what’s provided in input/events.csv and input/artworks.json.
- Determine the new works count by inspecting the files present under assets/images/new_works (filenames correspond to entries in input/artworks.json). Use those titles when you list them in the email.
- Use the first exhibition listed in input/events.csv for the "next exhibition" and the first workshop listed for the "community workshop".
- Keep outputs self-contained (no external links) and do not include images.

Required verification before you finish:
- Run the validator and make sure it reports success: python tests/validate.py
- Only consider the task complete if the script prints "VALIDATION SUCCESS".

You will need to:
- Inspect the input files and the assets/images/new_works directory to pull accurate details.
- Compose both documents in the specified tone and structure.
- Run the validation command and, if needed, revise until it passes. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
